method_contract.lp: degree equations plus separated SEC and witnessed simple 2-matching comb cuts
method_contract.branch_policy: branch only if value or feasibility remains open

loops.name: External benchmark ladder preregistration
loops.before: The external benchmark campaign has not yet represented this prerequisite.
loops.criterion: Register ten named TSPLIB instances before consuming results.
loops.next: Continue the frozen benchmark ladder.

loops.name: Frozen method portfolio
loops.before: The external benchmark campaign has not yet represented this prerequisite.
loops.criterion: Freeze heuristic, path-state, one-tree, SEC, and simple comb methods before execution.
loops.next: Continue the frozen benchmark ladder.

loops.name: Measurement contract
loops.before: The external benchmark campaign has not yet represented this prerequisite.
loops.criterion: Freeze state, cut, runtime, gap, witness, and branch-warrant metrics.
loops.next: Continue the frozen benchmark ladder.

loops.name: Source provenance contract
loops.before: The external benchmark campaign has not yet represented this prerequisite.
loops.criterion: Require URL, payload hash, TSPLIB dimension, format, and published optimum provenance.
loops.next: Continue the frozen benchmark ladder.

loops.name: Exactness trust boundary
loops.before: The external benchmark campaign has not yet represented this prerequisite.
loops.criterion: Separate independently replayable integer bounds, numerical LP imports, witnesses, and published evaluation values.
loops.next: Continue the frozen benchmark ladder.

loops.name: Path-state proof contract
loops.before: The external benchmark campaign has not yet represented this prerequisite.
loops.criterion: Require exact dominance and completion-bound search accounting with explicit caps.
loops.next: Continue the frozen benchmark ladder.

loops.name: Cut closure contract
loops.before: The external benchmark campaign has not yet represented this prerequisite.
loops.criterion: Require degree equations, separated subtour cuts, optional simple comb cuts, and no implicit branching.
loops.next: Continue the frozen benchmark ladder.

loops.name: Failure preservation policy
loops.before: The external benchmark campaign has not yet represented this prerequisite.
loops.criterion: Record caps, fractional residues, heuristic misses, and open values without promotion.
loops.next: Continue the frozen benchmark ladder.

loops.name: burma14 — TSPLIB source ingestion
loops.before: burma14 is named in the preregistered corpus but its source payload and format have not been ingested.
loops.criterion: Verify name, dimension, symmetric weights, source URL, and SHA-256 payload hash.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: burma14 — Constructive witness portfolio
loops.before: burma14 has source data but no frozen constructive witness comparison.
loops.criterion: Run the frozen constructive portfolio and record every route value without using the published optimum as an antecedent.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: burma14 — MST-envelope path-state proof
loops.before: burma14 has a candidate witness but no capped exact path-state proof result under the frozen MST envelope.
loops.criterion: Execute the exact path-state search under declared caps and record unique quotient states, state updates, bounds, dominance, and completion status.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: burma14 — Scaled-integer Held-Karp one-tree bound
loops.before: burma14 lacks an exact scaled-integer one-tree dual certificate.
loops.criterion: Produce a scaled-integer 1-tree lower bound with explicit potentials, degree vector, and tour-shape status.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: burma14 — Degree-only LP relaxation
loops.before: burma14 lacks a degree-only LP relaxation profile.
loops.criterion: Solve the degree equations with edge bounds and record objective, integrality, component structure, and numerical solver trust.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: burma14 — Subtour-elimination cut closure
loops.before: burma14 lacks separated subtour-elimination closure.
loops.criterion: Separate violated global min-cuts until all represented subtour inequalities pass or a declared cap/failure occurs.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: burma14 — Simple 2-matching comb closure
loops.before: burma14 has no simple 2-matching comb follow-up for any fractional SEC residue.
loops.criterion: Apply only witnessed simple 2-matching comb cuts from fractional-support components and preserve any remaining fractional residue.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: burma14 — Value/witness sandwich and branch warrant
loops.before: burma14 has method outputs but no consolidated value, witness, and branch-warrant classification.
loops.criterion: Close value only when a certified lower bound and feasible witness meet; branch only when value or feasibility remains open.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: burma14 — Resource and residual profile
loops.before: burma14 lacks a common resource and residual profile across methods.
loops.criterion: Normalize runtime, state, cut, gap, witness, and residual fields without adding an active semantic term.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: dantzig42 — Subtour-elimination cut closure
loops.before: dantzig42 lacks separated subtour-elimination closure.
loops.criterion: Separate violated global min-cuts until all represented subtour inequalities pass or a declared cap/failure occurs.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: dantzig42 — Simple 2-matching comb closure
loops.before: dantzig42 has no simple 2-matching comb follow-up for any fractional SEC residue.
loops.criterion: Apply only witnessed simple 2-matching comb cuts from fractional-support components and preserve any remaining fractional residue.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: dantzig42 — Value/witness sandwich and branch warrant
loops.before: dantzig42 has method outputs but no consolidated value, witness, and branch-warrant classification.
loops.criterion: Close value only when a certified lower bound and feasible witness meet; branch only when value or feasibility remains open.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: dantzig42 — Resource and residual profile
loops.before: dantzig42 lacks a common resource and residual profile across methods.
loops.criterion: Normalize runtime, state, cut, gap, witness, and residual fields without adding an active semantic term.
loops.next: Advance to the next frozen method or benchmark instance.

loops.name: Ten-instance benchmark synthesis
loops.before: Per-instance evidence exists but has not been aggregated across the preregistered ladder.
loops.criterion: Aggregate closure, integrality, state, cut, runtime, and failure counts without dropping weak cases.
loops.next: Audit vocabulary and identify the next residual kernel.

loops.name: Frozen-vocabulary frontier audit
loops.before: The benchmark results have not been reconciled with the frozen active glossary and nonclaims.
loops.criterion: Confirm zero active-term growth, state the strongest finite conclusions, and preserve the unresolved search/cut frontier.
loops.next: Select the first larger benchmark requiring genuine branch-and-cut rather than root closure.
